query:
SELECT outboundLocation, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM order_tracking
WHERE outboundLocation IS NOT NULL AND outboundLocation != ''
GROUP BY outboundLocation
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 100
OFFSET 20;
